scores.one_line_justification: Key-based email normalisation (strip+lower) with name kept exact; richest test set (case-only, whitespace-only, combined, stored-and-candidate non-mutation, name-case and name-whitespace interactions); spec R3 and docstrings updated faithfully.

Correct key-based normalisation via casefold and exact names; solid but leaner tests (no verbatim-on-write or candidate-mutation guard for R8); docstring says 'lower-cased' while code casefolds, a small honesty drift.

Correct minimal change with the strongest R8 write-path test (padded email stored verbatim), but collapsed boundary cases and no guard against mutation of existing records during comparison; spec and docstrings accurate.
